subject: [PATCH v5 1/2] mm: track DONTCACHE dirty pages per bdi_writeback

2026-05-04.patch_summary: This patch adds a new counter called WB_DONTCACHE_DIRTY to track the number of dirty pages that have been dirtied via RWF_DONTCACHE writes, which are used for dropbehind writes. The counter is incremented when a folio is dirtied with the dropbehind flag set and decremented when it's cleared or cleaned. This allows the writeback flusher to expedite writeback for IOCB_DONTCACHE writes without flushing the entire BDI's dirty pages, improving performance in certain scenarios.
